div.head: The Consul General at Peiping (Clubb) to the Secretary of State

opener.dateline:
Peiping, May 21, 1949—10 a. m.
[Received May 21—2:13 a. m.]

div.p:
876. ReDeptel 299, May 17. Letter dated May 19 southeast [sent] headquarters PLA, double registry, yesterday in sense directed. Letter
same date mailed Ward express double registry today, enclosing copies 2 letters headquarters and Depreftel.
Letters to headquarters requested travel facilities for Manhard [and] Armstrong.

ReDeptel 278, May 13,Same as telegram No. 98 to the Consul General at Tientsin, p. 1082. perforce of course addressed headquarters PLA as such. Since proposed in event nonreply however address either Chu TehCommander in Chief of Chinese Communist armies. or Mao Tse-tung or both re subject, re Contel 860 [896] May 18, Post, p. 1084. please instruct re mode address in present instance.
Copy letter to Ward and enclosure sent Tientsin for information.
Sent Department 876, repeated Nanking 569, OffEmb Canton 129, Shanghai 588.
